item.label: [PKT-LFC-005](task-0049): Legacy Cutover
item.summary: Handle legacy cutover from old installations

body:
# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-LFC-005](task-0039): Legacy Cutover

## Purpose

Handle legacy cutover from old installations.

## Scope

- Detect legacy
- Perform cutover
- Validate cutover

## Implementation

1. Detect legacy state
2. Perform cutover
3. Validate

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Legacy detected
2. Cutover completes
3. Validated
